Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'errors' in d: print\('ERRORS:', json.dumps\(d['errors'], indent=2\)\) else: wa = d['data']['websiteEntry'] attrs = wa.get\('globalAttributes', []\) nav = wa.get\('navigation', []\) print\(f'Global attribute groups: {len\(attrs\)}'\) for g in attrs[:3]: print\(f' Group: {g[\\"groupCode\\"]} \({len\(g[\\"attributes\\"]\)} attributes\)'\) print\(f'Navigation categories: {len\(nav\)}'\) for n in nav[:5]: print\(f' [{n[\\"level\\"]}] {n[\\"name\\"]} \(id:{n[\\"categoryId\\"]}\)'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if 'errors' in d: print\('ERRORS:', json.dumps\(d['errors'], indent=2\)\) else: wa = d['data']['websiteEntry'] attrs = wa.get\('globalAttributes', []\) nav = wa.get\('navigation', []\) print\(f'Global attribute groups: {len\(attrs\)}'\) for g in attrs[:3]: print\(f' Group: {g[\\"groupCode\\"]} \({len\(g[\\"attributes\\"]\)} attributes\)'\) print\(f'Top-level nav categories: {len\(nav\)}'\) for n in nav[:5]: children = n.get\('children', []\) print\(f' {n[\\"name\\"]} \(id:{n[\\"categoryId\\"]}, {len\(children\)} children\)'\) ")

Bash(find Services -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/CreatedBy = input\\.AccountId\\\([,}]\\\)/CreatedBy = input.AccountId.ToString\(\)\\1/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Services -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/ModifiedBy = input\\.AccountId\\\([,}]\\\)/ModifiedBy = input.AccountId.ToString\(\)\\1/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Services -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/CreatedBy = accountId\\\([,}]\\\)/CreatedBy = accountId.ToString\(\)\\1/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Services -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/ModifiedBy = accountId\\\([,}]\\\)/ModifiedBy = accountId.ToString\(\)\\1/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Services -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/ModifiedBy = quote\\.UserId\\\([,}]\\\)/ModifiedBy = quote.UserId?.ToString\(\)\\1/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Services -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/CreatedBy = quote\\.UserId\\\([,}]\\\)/CreatedBy = quote.UserId?.ToString\(\)\\1/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Services DataLoaders -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/\\.ModifiedBy = quote\\.UserId;/\\.ModifiedBy = quote.UserId?.ToString\(\);/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Services DataLoaders -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/\\.ModifiedBy = accountId;/\\.ModifiedBy = accountId.ToString\(\);/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Services DataLoaders -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/\\.CreatedBy = accountId;/\\.CreatedBy = accountId.ToString\(\);/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Services DataLoaders -name "*.cs" -type f -exec sed -i 's/= entity\\.CreatedDate$/= entity.CreatedDate ?? DateTime.UtcNow/g' {} \\;)

Bash(python -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) t = d.get\('data',{}\).get\('__type'\) if t and t.get\('inputFields'\): fields = [f['name'] for f in t['inputFields']] print\(', '.join\(fields\)\) else: print\('NOT FOUND'\) " done)

Bash(python -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) t = d.get\('data',{}\).get\('__type'\) if t and t.get\('inputFields'\): for f in t['inputFields']: ty = f['type'] name = ty.get\('name'\) or \(ty.get\('ofType'\) or {}\).get\('name'\) or str\(ty\) print\(f' {f[\\"name\\"]}: {name} \({ty[\\"kind\\"]}\)'\) " echo "" done)
